block_00: Hamari nayi suvidha ko aajmayen — Apni pasandida trading sampattiyon ki ek Watchlist banayen!
block_02: Aapki sabhi pasandida sampattiyan ek hi asthan par
block_04: Hum aapke saath apni nayi suvidha ko saajha karne ke liye utsaahit hain. Ab se, aap apni pasandida trading sampattiyon ko Watchlist me ikattha kar sakte hain. Is suvidha ke saath hum ise aur adhik samaayojya aur vayaktigat banaakar trading prakriya ko suvidhajanak banaane ki ummid karte hain.
block_08: ke parisampatti chayankarta menu me rakha jaata hai. "+" button par click karke sampatti chayankarta kholen.
block_09: Watchlist me trading sampatti ko jodne ke liye, bas sampatti ke naam ke saamne star icon par click karen. Sampatti ko hataane ke liye, sampatti ko Watchlist me khojen aur ek baar fir se star icon par click karen. Aap kisi bhi samy apni Watchlist ko access aur sampaadit kar sakte hain.
